title: [release-1.8] bump containers/storage and containers/image
body: Bump github.com/containers/storage to v1.13.2 and github.com/containers/image to v3.0.2, and bump github.com/vbauerstr/mpb and github.com/klauspost/compress to versions that the updated image library requires.
